title: HeroSteal
description: A Minecraft plugin that add custom Carachter/Heros into Game .
body:
![An OverView](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3h6LPqde/images/b677fe6d2c8e22b7aa4365c097107f12930946b1.png)

**⚔️ HeroSteal - Anime SMP Plugin**

**HeroSteal** is a feature-rich Minecraft plugin designed for Anime SMP servers. It combines a high-stakes **Life Steal** system with powerful **Hero Tokens**, allowing players to transform into legendary anime characters and wield their signature abilities.

---

## ✨ Features

*   **❤️ Life System**: hardcore life-steal mechanics. Lose all lives and you become **Soul Locked**!
*   **🦸 Hero Tokens**: Collect rare tokens to transform into anime characters.
*   **⚡ Unique Abilities**: Each character has 3 unlockable abilities (Tier 1, 2, 3) and passive buffs.
*   **🗡️ Steal Mechanics**: Kill players to steal their active Hero Token.
*   **📜 Story Mode**: Progression system with chapters (Admin controlled).
*   **🎨 Immersion**: Custom skins, particles, and sound effects for all abilities.

---

## 🎮 Commands

### Player Commands
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/herosteal lives` | Check your remaining lives. |
| `/herosteal abilities` | View your active abilities and cooldowns. |
| `/herosteal token list` | View all tokens you own. |
| `/herosteal token withdraw` | Withdraw your active character into a physical item. |

### Admin Commands
*(Requires `herosteal.admin` permission)*
| Command | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| `/herosteal admin givelives <player> <amount>` | Give lives to a player. |
| `/herosteal admin givetoken <player> <id>` | Give **and activate** a token for a player. |
| `/herosteal admin givetokenitem <player> <id>` | Give a physical token item (Right-click to use). |
| `/herosteal admin setChapter <chapter_id>` | Advance the server story chapter. |
| `/herosteal reload` | Reload configuration files. |

---

## 🦸 Hero Characters & Abilities

Transform into these legendary characters by obtaining their tokens!

### 🤞 Gojo Satoru `[LEGENDARY]`
*The Honored One. Master of the Limitless.*
*   **❤️ Health**: 10 Hearts (20 HP)
*   **⚡ Passive**: **Speed II** (Infinite)

#### Abilities:
1.  **Domain Expansion: Infinite Void** (Tier 1)
    *   Creates a **15-block radius** domain.
    *   **Effect**: You become invincible. All enemies inside are **Frozen**, **Blinded**, and unable to move or attack for **10 seconds**.
2.  **Limitless** (Tier 2)
    *   Creates an automatic **Infinity Barrier** (3 blocks) around you.
    *   **Effect**: Knocks back all enemies and **deflects projectiles** automatically for **30 seconds**.
3.  **Hollow Purple** (Tier 3)
    *   **Effect**: Fires a devastating purple energy beam that travels **50 blocks**. Deals massive damage (17.0) and knockback.

---

### 🐲 Goku `[LEGENDARY]`
*The Saiyan Warrior. Breaker of Limits.*
*   **❤️ Health**: 12 Hearts (24 HP)
*   **⚡ Passive**: **Fire Resistance**

#### Abilities:
1.  **Kamehameha** (Tier 1)
    *   **Effect**: fires a powerful blue energy beam in the direction you are facing.
2.  **Instant Transmission** (Tier 2)
    *   **Effect**: Instantly teleport a short distance to where you are looking.
3.  **Ultra Instinct** (Tier 3)
    *   **Effect**: Enter a godly state for **45 seconds**.
    *   **Buffs**: Speed IV, Haste II.
    *   **Auto-Dodge**: You have a **90% chance** to automatically dodge ANY incoming damage.

---

### 👺 Sukuna `[LEGENDARY]`
*The King of Curses.*
*   **❤️ Health**: 13 Hearts (26 HP)
*   **⚡ Passive**: **Strength I**

#### Abilities:
1.  **Cleave** (Tier 1)
    *   **Effect**: A swift slash of cursed energy damaging enemies.
2.  **Dismantle** (Tier 2)
    *   **Effect**: Rapid invisible slashing attacks.
3.  **Malevolent Shrine** (Tier 3)
    *   **Effect**: Expands a domain of **20 blocks** for **8 seconds**.
    *   **Damage**: Deals rapid, continuous slashing damage to everyone inside the radius.

---

### 👒 Monkey D. Luffy `[EPIC]`
*The Future Pirate King. Sun God Nika.*
*   **❤️ Health**: 11 Hearts (22 HP)
*   **⚡ Passive**: **Jump Boost**

#### Abilities:
1.  **Gum-Gum Pistol** (Tier 1)
    *   **Effect**: Launches a long-range punch attack.
2.  **Gear Second** (Tier 2)
    *   **Effect**: Grants a massive burst of movement speed.
3.  **Gear Fifth** (Tier 3)
    *   **Effect**: Transform into **Sun God Nika** for **30 seconds**.
    *   **Buffs**: **Double Health** (40 HP), Strength III, Speed II, Resistance II, Jump Boost III.
    *   **Visuals**: Lightning strikes and white/gold aura.

---

### 🍥 Naruto Uzumaki `[EPIC]`
*The Hero of the Hidden Leaf.*
*   **❤️ Health**: 11 Hearts (22 HP)
*   **⚡ Passive**: **Regeneration**

#### Abilities:
1.  **Rasengan** (Tier 1)
    *   **Effect**: Launch a powerful spiraling ball of wind chakra.
2.  **Shadow Clone Jutsu** (Tier 2)
    *   **Effect**: Spawns **4 Active Clones** for 30 seconds.
    *   **Behavior**: Clones will automatically seek out and attack nearby monsters.
3.  **Sage Mode** (Tier 3)
    *   **Effect**: Enter Sage Mode for a massive power boost.

---

## 🛠️ Installation

1.  Download `HeroSteal.jar`.
2.  Install the [SkinsRestorer](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/skinsrestorer.2124/) plugin (Required Dependency).
3.  Place both jars in your server's `plugins` folder.
4.  Restart the server.
5.  Edit `config.yml` and `tokens.yml` to customize messages and stats.
6. Download the [ResourcePack](https://github.com/Minzoid/HeroSteal/releases/download/ResourcePack/HeroSteal.zip).

## ⚠️ Permissions

*   `herosteal.admin` - Access to all admin commands (Default: OP)
*   `herosteal.admin.reload` - Permission to reload config (Default: OP)
